revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月三十]][[zh:六月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月三十]][[zh:六月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月三十]][[zh:六月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月三十]][[zh:六月三十]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 30|qq=June 30}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. It's the last day of the month if it is a {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} month, or the second last day if it is a {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} month.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}.
As with all other day 30s of the Sino-Japanese calendar, this occurrence sometimes happens and sometimes does not, depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == <!-- * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 5 ({{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} _月_日) – Permission is granted for a Western-style restaurant to operate inside {{ill|Shimbashi Station|en|Shimbashi Station|qid=Q801436|lt=Shimbashi Teishajō|1=Shimbashi Station}}—the first station eatery. *Note: June in Meiji 5 has only 29 days; verify the exact date. -->
== Births == * {{ill|Shōhō|en|Shōhō|qid=Q1146192|lt=Shōhō|1=Shōhō}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1644|en|1644|qid=Q6920|lt=1644|1=1644}} {{ill|August 2|en|August 2|qid=Q2785|lt=August 2|1=August 2}}) – {{ill|Yanagiwara Sukekado|ja|柳原資廉|1=Sukekado Yanagiwara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11534159}}, {{ill|Kugyō|en|Kugyō|qid=Q3138036|lt=Kuge|1=Kugyō}} (+ {{ill|1712|en|1712|qid=Q6871|lt=1712|1=1712}}) <!-- * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 5 ({{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} _月_日) – {{ill|Hirakushi Denchū|en|Hirakushi Denchū|qid=Q11483145|lt=Hirakushi Denchū|1=Hirakushi Denchū}}, {{ill|Sculptor|ja|彫刻家|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (+ {{ill|1979|en|1979|qid=Q2484|lt=1979|1=1979}}) There is also a view that gives Meiji 5, 1st month 15 (lunar) = New-style February 23. -->
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōkyō|en|Shōkyō|qid=Q1069086|lt=Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō}} 5 / {{ill|Engen|en|Engen|qid=Q1194159|lt=Engen|1=Engen}} 1 (Julian calendar {{ill|1336|en|1336|qid=Q6028|lt=1336|1=1336}} {{ill|August 7|en|August 7|qid=Q2781|lt=August 7|1=August 7}}) – {{ill|Nawa Nagatoshi|en|Nawa Nagatoshi|qid=Q11415325|lt=Nawa Nagatoshi|1=Nawa Nagatoshi}}, {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} * {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|qid=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun|1=Tenbun}} 3 (Julian calendar {{ill|1534|en|1534|qid=Q6447|lt=1534|1=1534}} {{ill|August 9|en|August 9|qid=Q2782|lt=August 9|1=August 9}}) – {{ill|Ukita Nōie|ja|宇喜多能家|lt=Ukita Nōie|lt_ja=宇喜多能家|1=Ukita Yoshiie|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11449185}}, {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}}
== Holidays and observances ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|29|7|1|5|30|7|6|0630|qq=}}
